The fact that there is no checking account due to the absence of a formal checking account elevating credit risk, because the absence of a formal checking account elevates credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk.[1]
The fact that there is less than one year of employment due to the lack of empirical data on employment tenure, because the lack of empirical data on employment tenure, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk.[2]
The fact that the loan purpose is for purchasing a radio or TV due to the lack of empirical analysis on consumer electronics loan purposes, because the lack of empirical analysis on consumer electronics loan purposes, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험을 증가시키는 신호로 인식되며, 본 모델은 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 판단합니다.[1]
재직 기간이 1년 미만 인 것은 고용 안정성 부족을 나타내어 신용 위험을 높이는 요인으로 분석되며, 본 모델 또한 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 분류합니다. [2].
전자제품 구매 목적은 신용 위험을 감소시키는 요인으로 문헌에서 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 분류합니다[3] .
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
